name: Six Shake Coin
short_description: This is a game that combines divination with cultivation to decipher and reason. You can learn about the knowledge of the Six Shake Coin while playing. Come and learn about the charm of traditional Chinese culture~
detailed_description: This is a game that combines Six Shake Coin divination with cultivation to decipher and reason. The game includes basic knowledge such as the Five Elements, Eight Diagrams, Sixty Four Diagrams, Twelve Longevity, and the various phenomena of the Eight Diagrams, as well as knowledge related to the Six Shake Coin divination such as copper coin shaking, SHI YING, NA JIA, LIU QIN, Fu Shen, Fei Shen, and Yong Shen. In addition, by combining the Eight Diagrams with spells from cultivation, players can experience some cultivation battles in the game. Come and learn about the charm of traditional Chinese culture~
about_the_game: This is a game that combines Six Shake Coin divination with cultivation to decipher and reason. The game includes basic knowledge such as the Five Elements, Eight Diagrams, Sixty Four Diagrams, Twelve Longevity, and the various phenomena of the Eight Diagrams, as well as knowledge related to the Six Shake Coin divination such as copper coin shaking, SHI YING, NA JIA, LIU QIN, Fu Shen, Fei Shen, and Yong Shen. In addition, by combining the Eight Diagrams with spells from cultivation, players can experience some cultivation battles in the game. Come and learn about the charm of traditional Chinese culture~
